3058640.name: WaggaSim
3058640.description:
Experience the Thrill of Flight Like Never Before

WaggaSim is a realistic paragliding simulator with advanced soft-body physics. The wings and wind-socks behave like real fabric, bending and flexing naturally. Design or modify your own gear, fly and perfect your style: soaring, thermaling, acro, freestyle... This is free flying, the opportunities are endless !

Key Features:

Realistic Wing Dynamics
Experience true-to-life aerodynamics ! The forces are dynamically adjusted based on airspeed, angle of attack, deformation and braking inputs, allowing for highly detailed collapses, stalls, and wind interactions. The wings in WaggaSim also adjust their internal pressure affecting how they bend and flex.



Procedural Wings & Customization
Create and modify your own paragliders, speed wings or even kite ! The intuitive wing editor allows you to design custom wings, which will behave realistically based on their shape and structure. Learn the intricacies of paragliding by experimenting with different designs and seeing how they perform in various conditions.

Ground Interaction
Perform stunning foot drags and perfect your precision with ease ! The pilot model features semi-ragdoll physics, allowing for realistic interactions with the terrain.



Perfect for Training and Fun
WaggaSim is designed and balanced to be fun and ideal for realistic training.
Why WaggaSim ?
  • Educational: Understand the principles of flight and wing behavior through hands-on experience, practice approaches and maneuvers.
  • Entertaining: Enjoy the freedom of flight, the physics based interactions and the beautiful landscapes.
  • Innovative: Use the wing builder to create and test custom designs, enhancing both fun and learning.
